docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HENDERSON, AODELE AKA AYO DELE HENDERSON
STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT SIGNED 4-16-98 BY COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN. FILED & MAILED TO COUNSEL THIS DATE.

M8/#624, COMM S KAPLAN, CSR L NAJERA, CLK H HAMILTON GREER SMITH FOR PLTFS, ROSALIE DAVIS FOR DEFT HENDERSON, WHO IS PRESENT. (DEFAULT ENTERED 2-2-98 AGAINST DEFT GONZALEZ). CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL, SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLTFS AWARDED RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 2250 - 24TH ST. #225, LEASE FORFEITED, RENT & DAMAGES $2278, FEES & COSTS $671, LATE FEE $50. SHOULD DEFT PAY $1139. IN CERTIFIED FUNDS BY 2-19- 98 2PM, JUDGMENT SHALL NOT ENTER UNTIL AFTER 2-28-98. IF DEFT VOLUNTARILY VACATES BY 2-28-98 & PAYS $1139 REPRESENT- ING FEB. 98 RENT IN 2 INSTALLMENTS DUE 3-15-98 & 4-15-98, NO JUDGMENT SHALL ISSUE. IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY BY 2-28-98 4PM, PLTF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR $1139, $50. LATE FEES, & $671. FEES & COSTS. IF DEFT VACATED BY 2-28-98 4PM, PLTF SHALL WAIVE FEES & COSTS. $500 SECURITY DEPOSIT'S ACCTNG SHALL BE EXTENDED TO 3 WKS AFTER 4-15-98.
